enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, using nature as a metaphor.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Paiyaa, the song highlights the romantic journey of the lead characters, enhancing their emotional connection.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Tanvi Shah.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Thuli Thuli Mazhaiyai was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 29, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thuli Thuli Mazhaiyai, the protagonists express their love through poetic lyrics and a soothing melody. The song beautifully captures the essence of romance, evoking feelings of joy and longing. Set against the backdrop of the film Paiyaa, it enhances the emotional depth of the characters' relationship. With its enchanting composition by Yuvan and heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar, this duet resonates with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thuli Thuli Mazhaiyai from Paiyaa is a mesmerizing duet that captures the essence of romance and longing. With Haricharan's soulful vocals complemented by Tanvi Shah's enchanting melody, this song is a beautiful expression of love. Yuvan's magical composition combined with Na Muthukumar's heartfelt lyrics makes it a must-listen for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: When the gentle rain falls, it quietly disappears; when you look at it, you start to feel its presence. When the breeze blows, it brings a smile.
She speaks softly, saying things that touch the heart; her beauty captivates the mind, making it ponder.
When the gentle rain falls, it quietly disappears.
She is like a goddess, with a beautiful face; is life enough to hold her fragrance? When I think of her, do flowers bloom?
When the dance begins on the stage, lightning strikes in the heart; when I see the waves, they lift my spirits, and when I look at the pearls, they shine brightly.
Her beauty captivates the mind, making it ponder.
She speaks softly, saying things that touch the heart; her beauty captivates the mind, making it ponder. In the beautiful rain, I want to go with her, and I will rest in her embrace.
In the light that falls on the earth, shadows run away; I will stay in my heart. When I see her, if she binds me, I will not escape; if she lets go, I will speak silently within.
Her beauty captivates the mind, making it ponder.
She speaks softly, saying things that touch the heart; her beauty captivates the mind, making it ponder.
